sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n85199" key="poluplasi/asma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πολυπλᾰσί-ασμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n85199.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">product of multiplication,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:349:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">349.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
